title: Weekends Photos
content:
Three of them .. to be exact.

After church, I went to World Trade (Central World, but I still call it World Trade). Kind of hungry so I looked for something to eat. And I happened to walk passed the infamous MOS Burger. The line is short so I decided to give it a try. And the verdict is, _I'm going back to Burger King_.

[![][1]][2]

On the way back, I received MMS from a certain person, twice actually. From the look, that person could not be much older than 15 years old. I hope she was trying to send the message to her parents. --"

(NO, I am not her parent.)

[![][3]][4]

And once again, my house is playing host to cat (animal), this time _two cats_. I believe they are romantically involved. Well at least I know what the parents look like if there are small cats running around next month or so. :P

[![][5]][6]

And that concludes my weekends.

**Go Vote, it's next week.**
